title: kubeadm reset — Graceful kube-apiserver shutdown
text:
If you have your
kube-apiserver
configured with the
--shutdown-delay-duration
flag,
you can run the following commands to attempt a graceful shutdown for the running API server Pod,
before you run
kubeadm reset
:
yq
eval
-i
'.spec.containers[0].command = []'
/etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml
timeout
60
sh -c
'while pgrep kube-apiserver >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done'
||
true
